feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Readiness Check
feed.subtitle: SAP Readiness Check Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Simplification Item Check (SIC)のチェック対象
entry.content:
S/4HANA 2021から2023のバージョンアップを計画しており、
事前に影響分析を実施するため、Simplification Item Checkを実行し、出力結果を確認中です。

S/4HANA 2021には、MDG（SAP Master Data Governance）とEWMをenbededして利用しています。
enbededした製品も、Simplification Item Checkの対象になりますか。

3rdパーティーの製品はSimplification Item Checkの対象外だが、
追加コンポーネントとしてS/4HANA2021にインストールした場合は、SAP製品は、Simplification Item Checkの分析対象になると理解しています。
理解はあっていますでしょうか


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: /SDF/RC_START_CHECK 実施時の警告メッセージ
entry.content:
ご担当者様

いつもお世話になっております。

S/4HANA変換チェックを行うために、以下のノートを順次適用しました。
・DIGITS - S4TC - SAP S/4HANA 変換およびアップグレード ※バージョン109
・DIGITS - シンプル化項目チェック

上記を適用後にノート 2502552 のバージョンが１つ(109→110)上がりましたので、
バージョンが109の状態で/SDF/RC_START_CHECKを実施しましたところ、
ジョブログやスプールに警告メッセージが出力されました。
※詳細は添付ファイル「RC_NEW_CHECK_IN_JOBの警告エラー.xlsx」をご参照ください

質問：
１．下記のノート変更内容を見たら、/SDF/RC_START_CHECKの結果に影響するほどの変更ではないと思いますが、
　　ジョブログやスプールに出力された警告メッセージを無視して良いでしょうか？
・変更ログ
　バージョン 110: 2502552 の適用がエラーで中止された場合に、
　　　　　　　　　前提条件ノートを 1 つずつ適用するためのノートテキストの小規模な調整のみ

２．バージョン110の変更内容は/SDF/RC_START_CHECKの結果に影響する場合、
　　SNOTEにて2502552を再度ダウンロードして適用すれば良いでしょうか？
　　それともノート2399707 までもう１回適用する必要があるでしょうか？


以上、宜しくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Readiness Check Run for S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" System Upgrade to 2023
entry.content:
Hi All,

Need advise on SAP Readiness Check  run for upgrade to 2023 on-prem version of S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" only system. As per SAP Note# 3049197 it says that Readiness Check is only applicable for S/4HANA full stack systems but out-of-scope for S/4HANA Foundation systems.

So in that case-

Q1) Does it mean we do not need to do such a check at all for Foundation S4 systems w.r.t note 3049197 ?

Q2) Do we still need to do something "similar" to the readiness check for an Upgrade from a lower ABAP Foundation (say 1709 or 1809) to S/4HANA Foundation 2023 FPS01 version w.r.t note 3049197 ?

Q3) When SUM tool is run then for a S/4HANA Full stack system it will check for SI related items and blocks the Upgrade if those have not  resolved/decided prior to running of SUM, does it means similar is the case for S/4 Foundation systems as well when SUM is run ?

Q4) (Follow-on question to Q3), then instead of readiness check, do  we need still need to run SI checks outside of Readiness check for S4 Foundation upgrade, also do we need to check for  ATC Custom code  checks and are they mandatorily needed for S4 Foundation upgrade ?

 

Note# 3059197 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

15. Can I use SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades to evaluate an SAP S/4HANA Foundation environment?

SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades is designed to support full stack SAP S/4HANA systems. The analysis of SAP S/4HANA Foundation systems used for deploying SAP HANA-only Add-Ons is out of scope.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM - Need to be run on Solution Manager?
entry.content:
Good Day

Can you run ALM readiness check on an ECC system without Solution Manager? Basically do you need Solution Manager to run ALM readiness checks?

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Readiness Check: Maintenance Planner Error
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Can someone provide guidance on what actions need to be taken when the Add-On Compatibility and Active Business Functions analyses in the SAP Readiness Check indicate that "Maintenance Planner Status is Error"?

Is there any documentation I can refer to for this issue?

Best regards,
Kaiwen

SAP Readiness Check

entry.title: The system does not have authority object SM_BPM_DET.
entry.content:
Missing authority object SM_BPM_DET to run RC_VALUE_DISCOVERY_COLL_DATA.

"The system does not have the authority object SM_BPM_DET."

Please let me know how to add authority to run the above program.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to solve RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA not executing?
entry.content:
As per the note 2913617, when I try to run RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA in SA38, it doesn’t proceed to the selection screen or move ahead in anyway.

When I try to check the program in SE38, it shows the following message.

entry.title: How to read the SI Checks results
entry.content:
I performed the SI Checks, but I don't know how to view the results and what to do. 
There are 3 columns (Relevance, Last Consistency Result, Exemption Possible), I don't know what they mean.

if they have error,i can solve it according to Note.

But,they have other 2 kind log

1)))5  items have been skipped for consistency check because manual check is needed.
2)))22  items relevant, but no consistency check defined; refer to business impact note.
How should these two logs be handled?

What I want to confirm is, for example, should the items in Pacture2 with the "Not Applicable" status be processed manually or ignored?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: System check for Orphaned Client Dependent Data
entry.content:
2618018 - S4TWL - Generic Check for SAP S/4HANA Conversion and Upgrade

 

on this for the below task
Check for orphaned client dependent data

 

1.We have not performed any client deletion on the recent past but need to know how to check the status of any abrupt/stopped Client deletion status at SAP level 
2.Also how to check if any orphaned client dependent data in DB level
3.Also what is impact of this action item "Check for orphaned client dependent data"
It has actioned before conversion ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to execute SI-CHECK when there are multiple production clients?
entry.content:
We are planning to migrate our ECC system with multiple production clients to an S/4HANA system with a brownfield conversion.
I have reviewed materials such as SAP Note 2270339 , but I couldn't find specific guidance on executing the SI-CHECK process for multiple production clients.
Regarding the SI-CHECK process, I would like to clarify the following:
・What steps are necessary for each client?
・Are there any steps that can be omitted for specific clients?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 3236443 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALMについて
entry.content:
SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALMの実施を予定しています。

前提条件に記載のあるSTコンポーネント3477026 は事前にすべて当てきる必要はありますでしょうか？

Readiness Checkに関係あるのか無いのかを読み取ることができませんでしたので確認をお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Code Migration (BTP): Object Navigation missing
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using the Custom Code Migration App in the BTP. In the list of findings the objects are named but they are all disabled for navigation (greyed out) and therefore it's not possible to find the specific code segment in these objects that need to be adjusted. This is case for every finding.

 

Any information on why the navigation is disabled or how to alternatively find the affected code segments would be greatly appreciated.

Best Regards

entry.content:
How to deal with the SI Checks results

entry.title: Readiness Check: Target S/4HANA Version: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud 2023
entry.content:
Hello,

Astrid Tschense shared a slide with the latest target S/4HANA versions during her presentation at DSAG Thementag S/4HANA. In her screenshot I can see a Target S/4HANA Version " SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud 2023 [03 (02/2025) FPS].

We implemented the lastest notes for the readiness check, but we are still not able to see the target version. Also I cannot find anything in help portal. 

Is the target version alreay available for customers?

 

Kind regards

Valeska

entry.title: SUSG integration with ATC
entry.content:
Hello All - there are soo many tcodes/ tool within SAP for performing analysis of Sap ECC custom code to S4 Hana conversion , which one is most preferred one ?

custom code  -  Analyze the custom code to S4 using ATC - ? or other SAP Readiness check2.0  /SDF/? 

usage of custom code - SUSG , SCMON , UPL - ? other ?

are there any sap ecc related fiori app to merge information of custom code along with usage ? - like CCMC / CCLM in solution manager ?

 

thanks

entry.title: S4 - Migration - Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello All - 

for planning the migration of custom code from ECC to S4 , ( Fiori Migration app need to be always run on S4 as backend system? 

or if we have run the readiness check in the ECC using ATC (ABAP TEST COCKPIT) , can the zip file be uploaded directly ? 

 

thanks 

aakash

entry.title: Checklist Before HANA Upgrade (Brownfield)
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

I have a customer who will be transitioning from SAP ECC to SAP HANA. A brownfield migration is planned. In this context, what is the easiest way to identify the developments and enhancements made in the ECC system? What should I do to adjust these developments after the system is upgraded to HANA?

I've gathered some information through research, but I'm looking for comprehensive knowledge. I'm open to your valuable suggestions.

 

Kind regards,
Nedim YILMAZ

entry.title: SAP Note #2502552に記載のノートについて
entry.content:
SAPご担当者様

お世話になります。
現在、S/4HANAアップグレード検討の準備として、SAP Readiness Checkを実行したいと考えています。
Readiness Checkで実行するシンプル化項目整合性チェック有効化の調査をしているのですが、以下ノートについて追加で確認させてください。

DIGITS - S4TC - SAP S/4HANA 変換およびアップグレード新規シンプル化項目チェック


＜ご質問＞

SAP Note #DIGITSについて

Q1. SAP Note #DIGITSの"ソリューション"項目の中に、「TCI に対する追加修正 (自動的に取り込まれる)」と書かれているノートが8件あります。これらのノートが"自動的に取り込まれる"とはどういう意味でしょうか？

また、Q1で前述した8件のノートは、SAP Note #DIGITSの前提条件であると認識しています。その中のひとつSAP Note #DIGITSの前提条件にSAP Note #DIGITSがあります。
このSAP Note #DIGITSについて以下2点確認させてください。

SAP Note #DIGITSについて

Q2."現象"や"理由および前提条件"項目に、"SAP S/4HANA DIGITS リリース"の記載があるのですが、こちらのノートはSAP S/4HANA DIGITS リリースへのアップグレード時のみ対象でしょうか？それ以降のリリースへのアップグレード時も対象ですか？

 

Q3.このノートの注意点の一つに「当 SAP ノートは、SAP S/4HANA 出力制御を使用していないアプリケーションには関連しません。」とあります。今回のアップグレード対象システムでは使用していないソリューションなのではないかと思っているのですが、SAP S/4HANA 出力制御を使用していない場合、このノートは適用不可・不要でしょうか？また、SAP S/4HANA 出力制御の使用有無についての確認方法はありますか？

＜追加情報＞
現行S/4HANA本番機の関連ソフトウェアコンポーネントのリリース：
SAP_BASIS    751 SP02
S4CORE        101 SP01


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Readiness check on cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please assist to generate SAP readiness check report on Cloud ALM? I did not find any suitable blog for cloud ALM.

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4/HANA Readiness Check Issue
entry.content:
We ran the readiness check program in our ECC dev system with target S/4 version "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 (03 (02/2025) FPS)". We uploaded the zip file in the SAP marketplace readiness check and when the data is loaded and we want to go inside the analysis we are getting the below warning. Not sure which SAP note it is referring here- Does it mean to update "SAP Note assistance" SNOTE?

We have detected that your SAP Note does not support Private Cloud Edition, and as a result, we cannot fully guarantee the accuracy of the current check results. In light of your particular scenario (conversion / upgrade), we strongly recommend that you upgrade to the latest SAP Notes version and perform the check again.
